---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the Seerr TV app
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Why?**
The problem it solves or the use case it enables (especially on a TV remote).

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you've tried or other approaches.

> Note: Seerr TV wraps your server's existing web UI, so many "features" come from
> Jellyseerr/Seerr itself. Requests best suited here are about the **TV/remote
> experience** (navigation, focus, on-screen keyboard, setup, the native host).
